top_signals.title: Jet Fuel’s War Surge Vindicates Airlines Who Stuck With Hedging
top_signals.summary: The surge in the cost of jet fuel since the start of the Iran war is highlighting the vast disparity in how well individual airlines protect themselves against a price spike.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
